languages.original_text: {n}His unaugmented eye closes and his mouth relaxes into a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest inhales deeply of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a machine spirit cannot be looked upon. And he was right, for the Omnissiah, in His infinite wisdom, has concealed His creation even from the gaze of His most devoted servants. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."

languages.text: {n}Его неаугментированный глаз закрыт, а губы расслаблены в умиротворенной улыбке. Сложив руки на аугментированном брюхе, техножрец с упоением втягивает пронизанный озоном и священными маслами воздух.{/n} "Один мудрец молвил, что Духа Машины невозможно узреть. И он был прав, ибо {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g} в бескрайней мудрости сокрыл свои творения даже от взглядов вернейших слуг. Но разве верующий может познать естество машины лишь через око органическое или стальное? Нет. Ведь пар, исторгающий запах священных масел — дыхание Духа, грохот суставов и стержней — биение его сердца, а Движущая Сила — ток его крови".

traits.locale_text: {n}Его неаугментированный глаз закрыт, а губы расслаблены в умиротворенной улыбке. Сложив руки на аугментированном брюхе, техножрец с упоением втягивает пронизанный озоном и священными маслами воздух.{/n} "Один мудрец молвил, что Духа Машины невозможно узреть. И он был прав, ибо {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссия{/g} в бескрайней мудрости сокрыл свои чада даже от взглядов вернейших слуг. Но разве верующий может познать естество машины лишь через око органическое или стальное? Нет. Ведь пар, исторгающий запах священных масел — дыхание Духа, грохот суставов и стержней — биение его сердца, а Движущая Сила — ток его крови".
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: {n}彼の眼は開いていない。口は穏やかな微笑みで緩んでいる。機械神官は機械的な腹を腕で覆い、オゾンと聖なる香油が混ざった息を吸い込む。{/n} 「賢い男が言ったように、機械霊は見ることはできない。そして彼は正しい。無限の知恵を持つオムニシアは、最も忠実なしもべの視線からも、自身の子供たちを隠している。しかし、信者は有機物や鋼鉄の眼を通してのみ機械の性質を知ることはできない。聖なる香油の香りを生み出す蒸気は機械霊の息吹、関節と棒の轟きは機械霊の心臓の鼓動、そして動力源は機械霊の血流である」
languages.original_text: {n}His unaugmented eye is closed, and his mouth is relaxed in a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest takes a gusty inhale of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a Machine Spirit cannot be looked upon. And he was right, for the Omnissiah, in His infinite wisdom, has concealed His offspring even from the gaze of His most devoted servants. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the Spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."

languages.text: {n}Sein unaugmentiertes Auge schließt sich, und sein Mund entspannt sich zu einem gelassenen Lächeln. Der Techpriester verschränkt die Arme über seinem augmentierten Bauch und atmet die mit Ozon und heiligen Salben geschwängerte Luft tief ein.{/n} "Ein weiser Mann sagte einst, dass man einen Maschinengeist nicht sehen kann. Und er hatte recht, denn der {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} hat das Antlitz Seiner Schöpfung in Seiner grenzenlosen Weisheit selbst vor den Blicken Seiner treuesten Diener verborgen. Aber kann ein Glaubender das Wesen einer Maschine nur durch ein Auge aus Gewebe oder Stahl erkennen? Nein. Denn der Dampf, der den Duft heiliger Salben trägt, ist der Atem des Geistes. Das Grollen von Gelenken und Stäben ist sein Herzschlag. Und die Antriebskraft ist der Strom seines Blutes."
languages.original_text: {n}His unaugmented eye closes and his mouth relaxes into a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest inhales deeply of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a machine spirit cannot be looked upon. And he was right, for the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, in His infinite wisdom, has concealed His creation even from the gaze of His most devoted servants. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."

Und er hatte recht, denn der {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} hat das Antlitz Seiner Schöpfung in Seiner grenzenlosen Weisheit selbst vor den Blicken Seiner treuesten Diener verborgen. Das Grollen von Gelenken und Stäben ist sein Herzschlag. Und die Antriebskraft ist der Strom seines Blutes."

languages.text: {n}Su ojo no aumentado está cerrado, y su boca se relaja con una sonrisa de calma. El tecnosacerdote cruza ambos brazos sobre su tripa mecanizada y respira profundamente el aire impregnado de ozono y ungüentos sagrados.{/n} «Un sabio dijo una vez que es imposible contemplar a los espíritus máquina. Y tenía razón, pues el {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, en Su infinita sabiduría, ha ocultado a Sus creaciones incluso de la mirada de Sus más devotos siervos. ¿Pero puede un creyente conocer la naturaleza de una máquina empleando únicamente sus ojos, ya sean orgánicos o de acero? No. Pues las emanaciones de los ungüentos sagrados son el hálito del espíritu, el rechinar de pistones son los latidos de su corazón, y la Fuerza Motriz es el flujo de su sangre».
languages.original_text: {n}His unaugmented eye closes and his mouth relaxes into a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest inhales deeply of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a machine spirit cannot be looked upon. And he was right, for the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, in His infinite wisdom, has concealed His creation even from the gaze of His most devoted servants. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."

Y tenía razón, pues el {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, en Su infinita sabiduría, ha ocultado a Sus creaciones incluso de la mirada de Sus más devotos siervos. ¿Pero puede un creyente conocer la naturaleza de una máquina empleando únicamente sus ojos, ya sean orgánicos o de acero? No. Pues las emanaciones de los ungüentos sagrados son el hálito del espíritu, el rechinar de pistones son los latidos de su corazón, y la Fuerza Motriz es el flujo de su sangre».

languages.text: {n}Ogmentsiz gözü kapanıyor, ağzıysa huzurlu bir gülümsemeyle gevşiyor. Kollarını ogmentli karnının üzerinde kavuşturan Tekno Rahip, ozon ve kutsal özyağlarla dolu havayı derin bir nefesle içine çekiyor.{/n} "Bilge bir adam bir keresinde bir makine ruhuna bakılamayacağını söylemişti. Haklıydı da zira {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g}; sonsuz bilgeliğiyle, yaratımlarını en sadık hizmetkârlarının bakışlarından bile gizlemiştir. Ancak inançlı bir kimse, bir makinenin doğasını sadece organik veya çelikten bir gözle mi tanıyabilir? Hayır. Çünkü kutsal özyağların kokusunu getiren buhar, ruhun nefesidir; eklemlerin ve çubukların gürlemesi, kalbinin atışıdır. Devinim Gücü, kanının akışıdır."
languages.original_text: {n}His unaugmented eye closes and his mouth relaxes into a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest inhales deeply of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a machine spirit cannot be looked upon. And he was right, for the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, in His infinite wisdom, has concealed His creation even from the gaze of His most devoted servants. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."

Haklıydı da zira {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g}; sonsuz bilgeliğiyle, yaratımlarını en sadık hizmetkârlarının bakışlarından bile gizlemiştir. Ancak inançlı bir kimse, bir makinenin doğasını sadece organik veya çelikten bir gözle mi tanıyabilir? Hayır. Çünkü kutsal özyağların kokusunu getiren buhar, ruhun nefesidir; eklemlerin ve çubukların gürlemesi, kalbinin atışıdır. Devinim Gücü, kanının akışıdır."

languages.text: {n}Son œil non augmenté se ferme et sa bouche s'étire pour afficher un sourire serein. Les bras croisés sur son ventre augmenté, le technoprêtre inspire profondément l'air imprégné d'ozone et d'onguents sacrés.{/n} « Un sage a dit un jour que nul ne peut poser les yeux sur un esprit de la machine. Et il disait vrai, car l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g}, dans Son infinie sagesse, a caché Sa création même au regard de Ses serviteurs les plus dévoués. Mais un croyant pourrait-il véritablement connaître la nature d'une machine uniquement à travers un œil organique ou d'acier ? Non. Car la vapeur dont s'échappe le parfum des onguents sacrés est le souffle de l'esprit, le grondement des articulations et des tiges le battement de son cœur, et la Force Motrice le flux de son sang. »
languages.original_text: {n}His unaugmented eye closes and his mouth relaxes into a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest inhales deeply of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a machine spirit cannot be looked upon. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."

languages.text: {n}他闭上了那只未加装植入物的眼睛，嘴角露出平静的微笑。技术神甫双臂交叠于加装了植入物的腹部，深吸了一口弥漫着臭氧与神圣机油芳香的空气。{/n}“一位智者曾言，机魂不可直视。他是正确的，因为{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}以无穷的智慧，深藏其造物，纵然是最虔诚的仆从也无从得见。但信徒只能通过血肉或钢铁之眼认识机械的本质吗？非也。因为那散发神圣机油芳香的蒸汽，便是机魂的呼吸；关节与连杆的隆隆作响，便是它心脏的跳动；而源力，便是其奔流的血液。”
languages.original_text: {n}His unaugmented eye closes and his mouth relaxes into a serene smile. Crossing his arms over his augmented belly, the Tech-Priest inhales deeply of air infused with ozone and sacred unguents.{/n} "A wise man once said that a machine spirit cannot be looked upon. And he was right, for the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g}, in His infinite wisdom, has concealed His creation even from the gaze of His most devoted servants. But can the believer come to know the nature of a machine only through an eye of organics or steel? No. For the vapour that brings forth the scent of sacred unguents is the spirit's breath, the rumbling of joints and rods is the beating of its heart, and the Motive Force is the current of its blood."
